properties.name: Saldanha Bay
properties.description: 1er port export fer d'Afrique. 60 Mt/an vers Chine. Corridor Sishen-Saldanha (Transnet).

properties.name: Richards Bay
properties.description: 1er port charbonnier mondial (75 Mtpa). Charbon thermique export vers Asie / Europe.

properties.name: Nouadhibou
properties.description: Port mineralier SNIM (fer). 12 Mt/an. Liaison ferroviaire Zouerate (mine-port 700 km).

properties.name: Matadi
properties.description: Principal port du Kongo Central. Transit cuivre/cobalt Katanga via rail vers Atlantique. Alternative au corridor Lobito.

properties.name: Boma
properties.description: Port fluvio-maritime RDC. Export bois, minerais. En aval de Matadi.

properties.name: Kamsar
properties.description: Principal port bauxite mondial (Compagnie des Bauxites de Guinee). Export vers raffineries alumine Chine/Europe.

properties.name: Conakry
properties.description: Port multifonction, export bauxite et or. Hub CEDEAO ouest. Concede Bollore.
